subcodes.first_line: O ye who stand firm in the Covenant! A letter hath been received from Jináb-i-Ahmad Yazdání, and your blessed letters were enclosed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه از جناب احمد یزدانی رسید و نامهای مبارک شما مندرج و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
